LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KAMRAN EHSANIPOUR'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ))BELDON YEE # 2647
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-18-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER EHSANIPOUR, KAMRAN RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MEHR, MAHNAZ SADEGHYAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA CARAVANS RESTAURANT $21,201.61 PRINCIPAL, $3,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,146.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,348.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
